mapper.select:
SELECT ac.id, ac.config_name as configName, ac.api_key as apiKey, ac.base_url as baseUrl, ac.model, ac.is_active as isActive, ac.create_time as createTime, ac.update_time as updateTime, uc.real_name as createUserName, uu.real_name as updateUserName FROM t_ai_config ac LEFT JOIN t_user uc ON ac.create_user_id = uc.id LEFT JOIN t_user uu ON ac.update_user_id = uu.id WHERE ac.is_deleted = 0
AND ac.config_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{configName}, '%')
ORDER BY ac.is_active DESC, ac.update_time DESC
SELECT id, config_name as configName, api_key as apiKey, base_url as baseUrl, model, is_active as isActive FROM t_ai_config WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND is_active = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE t_ai_config SET is_active = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND is_active = 1
